item.description:
FnMacAssistant v2.1

This update mostly fixes issues caused by GitHub's flag on my account. It also contains some improvements. Additionally, this update should now work with the latest version of Fortnite!

Changelog

IPA Downloader

- Changed IPA downloads tab to fetch the download links from another source.
- The IPA's description now comes from the json.

Automatic updater

- The automatic updater now fetches updates from GitLab.

Thanks for using FnMacAssistant!
If you'd like to support future development, maintenance, and updates like this one, consider using code ISACUCHO in the item shop or in the epic games store.
